feed.title: Information Visions Lab
feed.subtitle: The Information Visions Lab @ CU Boulder imagines a future of data communication that prioritizes equity & access. Our research draws on vis tools and techniques to empower how diverse communities trust, create, and engage with data.

entry.title: Example post 1
entry.content: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.
